title: Enforce dev-only commits and pushes with local git hook guard
scope: Add a branch guard script that fails when the current branch is not dev
Add a hook installer script that wires the guard into pre-commit and pre-push hooks
Document the branch guard installation in chat-only workflow docs
acceptance_criteria: pre-commit and pre-push hooks can be installed from repo scripts
installed hooks block commit/push when current branch is not dev
workflow docs include branch guard installation steps
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: This is a local-repo guard and does not replace remote branch protection settings
rollback_plan: Remove installed hooks and revert new scripts/docs/changelog entries
